caption: A man with a beard and glasses wears a white collared shirt, beige suspenders, a small brown bow tie, and a large, grey, pointed wig that resembles a crest. He is wearing black headphones and speaking into a professional microphone on a boom arm. He is positioned in a room with walls covered in numerous small, framed photographs. A white storage bin and a black shelf are visible in the background. On-screen graphics include a logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expressions as he talks. The camera remains static, and there are no other people visible in the scene.
